mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM rnum, A.* FROM (
SELECT APT_CMPLEX_NO , APT_CMPLEX_NM , BJD_CD , SIDO_NM , SIGUNGU_NM , EMD_NM , LAT_VAL , LON_VAL , UNIT_CNT , BLD_YR , CNSCO_NM , IMG_FILE_NO , RPRSNT_IMG_FILE_NO , HEAT_TY , PKG_CNT , MAX_FLOOR , FREE_PKG_CNT , DONG_CNT , DOROJUSO , CC_CNT FROM APT_COMPLEX WHERE 1 = 1
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '가' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '나'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '나' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '다'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '다' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '라'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '라' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '마'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '마' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '바'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '바' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '사'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '사' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '아'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '아' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '자'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '자' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '차'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '차' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '카'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '카' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '타'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '타' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '파'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '파' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '하'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '하' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) <= '힣'
AND ( APT_CMPLEX_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchType} || '%' OR DOROJUSO LIKE '%' || #{searchType} || '%' )
AND SIDO_NM = #{searchVO.sidoNm}
AND SIGUNGU_NM = #{searchVO.sigunguNm}
AND EMD_NM = #{searchVO.emdNm}
AND UNIT_CNT < 500
AND UNIT_CNT >= 500 AND UNIT_CNT < 1000
AND UNIT_CNT >= 1000
ORDER BY APT_CMPLEX_NM ASC
) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rnum >= #{startRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APT_COMPLEX WHERE 1 = 1
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '가' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '나'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '나' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '다'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '다' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '라'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '라' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '마'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '마' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '바'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '바' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '사'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '사' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '아'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '아' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '자'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '자' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '차'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '차' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '카'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '카' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '타'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '타' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '파'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '파' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) < '하'
AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) >= '하' AND SUBSTR(APT_CMPLEX_NM, 1, 1) <= '힣'
AND ( APT_CMPLEX_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchType} || '%' OR DOROJUSO LIKE '%' || #{searchType} || '%' )
AND SIDO_NM = #{searchVO.sidoNm}
AND SIGUNGU_NM = #{searchVO.sigunguNm}
AND UNIT_CNT < 500
AND UNIT_CNT >= 500 AND UNIT_CNT < 1000
AND UNIT_CNT >= 1000
SELECT APT_CMPLEX_NO , APT_CMPLEX_NM , DOROJUSO FROM APT_COMPLEX WHERE APT_CMPLEX_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY APT_CMPLEX_NM ASC
SELECT DISTINCT SIGUNGU_NM FROM APT_COMPLEX WHERE SIDO_NM = #{sidoNm} AND SIGUNGU_NM IS NOT NULL ORDER BY SIGUNGU_NM
SELECT DISTINCT SIDO_NM FROM APT_COMPLEX WHERE SIDO_NM IS NOT NULL ORDER BY SIDO_NM

SELECT APT_CMPLEX_NO, APT_CMPLEX_NM, BJD_CD, SIDO_NM, SIGUNGU_NM, EMD_NM, LAT_VAL, LON_VAL, UNIT_CNT, BLD_YR, CNSCO_NM, IMG_FILE_NO, RPRSNT_IMG_FILE_NO, HEAT_TY, PKG_CNT, MAX_FLOOR, FREE_PKG_CNT, DONG_CNT, DOROJUSO, CC_CNT FROM APT_COMPLEX WHERE APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo}

SELECT APT_CMPLEX_NO AS aptCmplexNo, APT_CMPLEX_NM AS aptCmplexNm, SIDO_NM AS sidoNm, SIGUNGU_NM AS sigunguNm, DOROJUSO AS dorojuso, LAT_VAL AS latVal, LON_VAL AS lonVal, UNIT_CNT AS unitCnt, DONG_CNT AS dongCnt FROM APT_COMPLEX WHERE LAT_VAL IS NOT NULL AND LON_VAL IS NOT NULL
